purpose: Authoritative operational handover for coding agents working within ADPA under RPAS Cloud Master governance.

responsibilities: Implements all governance rituals: propose, decide, execute
Validates lifecycle integrity and authority boundaries
Exposes REST APIs to Experience Tier
Implements governance rituals: propose, decide, execute
Read-only exploration of RTM and amendments
Read-only exploration of RTM and lineage
Full RTM history, CSR versions, superseded lineage
AI research advisor for RTM evolution

restrictions: No direct DB access or mutations

rules: CSR versioning required for all Execution artifacts
No in-place modification of any governance artifact

rpas_guardrails.G1_authority_boundary: AI may only propose; humans decide; orchestrator executes. No silent mutations.
rpas_guardrails.G2_lifecycle_integrity: All state changes must follow the ritual sequence: Ideation → Business Case → Approval → Seed → Proposal → Decision → Execution → CSR.
rpas_guardrails.G3_evidence_and_lineage: All artifacts must reference their governing decision and retain immutable snapshots.
rpas_guardrails.G4_determinism: Execution must be idempotent and deterministic. Replays cannot corrupt state.
rpas_guardrails.G5_read_vs_act: Experience tier may only mutate via explicit rituals; research tier is read-only.

cloud_ready_criteria.CR1_deterministic_execution: CSR versioning ensures deterministic, replay-safe behavior.
cloud_ready_criteria.CR2_authority_gated_mutation: All mutations must be tied to explicit, human-attributed decisions.
cloud_ready_criteria.CR4_failure_safety: System must withstand retries, network duplication, or restarts.
cloud_ready_criteria.CR5_experience_decoupling: Governance logic lives in orchestrator, not UI.

AEV_RPAS_PIPELINE.gate_1: Mechanical Integrity — Only intended files modified. No scope creep.
AEV_RPAS_PIPELINE.gate_2: Build Integrity — dotnet build must succeed with no errors.
AEV_RPAS_PIPELINE.gate_3: Orchestration Integrity — Aspire AppHost resolves fully with all services healthy.
AEV_RPAS_PIPELINE.gate_4: Governance Attestation — Explicit validation of G1–G5 compliance.

governance_guardrails.G1_authority_boundary: AI proposes, Human approves, Orchestrator executes. No direct state mutation from Experience Tier or AI.
governance_guardrails.G2_lifecycle_integrity: All state transitions must follow the ritual chain.
governance_guardrails.G3_evidence_and_lineage: Every artifact must reference its governing decision, amendment, and CSR version.
governance_guardrails.G4_determinism: Execution must be idempotent, replay-safe, deterministic.
governance_guardrails.G5_read_vs_act: Experience Tier cannot mutate state outside explicit rituals.

experience_tier_restrictions.governor_portal: May approve or execute, not propose

cloud_ready_criteria.CR2_authority_gated_mutation: All mutations tied to human Decision ritual.
cloud_ready_criteria.CR3_append_only_history: No deletes or updates to governed data.
cloud_ready_criteria.CR4_failure_safety: Safe under retries and multi-region execution.

rules: Avoid static initialization (reads before Aspire injects env)

aev_workflow_gates.atomicity_contract: One logical change only. Fully specified scope.
aev_workflow_gates.gate_1_mechanical_integrity: git status / git diff --stat. Only declared files changed.
aev_workflow_gates.gate_2_build_integrity: dotnet build. All projects compile. No new warnings/errors.
aev_workflow_gates.gate_3_orchestration_integrity: dotnet run --project Adpa.AppHost. Aspire resolves all services without exceptions.
aev_workflow_gates.gate_4_governance_attestation: Verify ledger is append-only, human approval gates execution, idempotent events.
aev_workflow_gates.commit_certification: Commits must be prefixed with 'SAFE: <atomic change description>'.
aev_workflow_gates.rollback_rule: If ANY gate fails, revert to last SAFE commit. Do not debug in a dirty state.

agent_responsibilities: Modify backend only within ritual boundaries
Preserve role separation in Experience Tier
Ensure AI never executes or mutates state
Fix mechanical issues before semantic logic
Document all topology or migration steps
Fix mechanical integrity BEFORE semantic logic
